subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath caused to descend from the clouds of His bounty upon His servants and the dwellers of His lands the showers of wisdom and utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل من سحاب عطائه علی عباده و اهل بلاده امطار الحکمة و البیان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @proclamation to the people of the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
